meaning: n.越过水坝落下的水,叠层结构,等分半圆锥
examples: The thrust nappe is assembled by root zone, major thrust zone and thrust front.
The fracture is composed of the tectonic melange zone and the nappe structure zone.
Decollement-nappe structure of the Guanyinping region is a part of nappe structure of Wudang Mountain.
